preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.languageHint: Select interface language. This setting takes precedence, otherwise follows system.

display.title: Display Management
display.hint: Click a card to switch the currently selected display. Right‑click a card or empty area to create, edit, enable/disable, or delete. Drag cards to reorder.
display.openSkipped: , skipped {count} display(s) (do not meet display conditions)
display.closeCommandSent: Close command sent to all displays
display.lineNameMergeDesc: Display multiple line names concatenated on the left side of the display.
display.showAllStationsDesc: Ignore the number of stations and stretch the full line diagram to fit one screen.
display.wallpaperHint: Add a background image to the Next Station/Arrival and End pages.
display.cTypeDisplayDesc: Simulate layout on displays with different aspect ratios (C‑type only has the right half screen).
display.nextStationDuration: Next Station / Arrival Page Display Duration
display.nextStationDurationDesc: Display duration (in seconds) for the “Next Station” white screen and the “Arrival” white screen.
display.departDurationDesc: Display duration (in seconds) for the information page shown when the train just departs, including “Thank you for riding” and the next station name.
display.display3TrainFormationDesc: The departure/exit screen will render the train consist according to this formation.
display.display3ActiveCarDesc: Which carriage number should be highlighted on the right‑side consist diagram.
display.display3VirtualPosDesc: When one line spans multiple LCD screens, this specifies whether this screen is on the left, center or right side of the train.

api.title: API Server
api.tip1: When enabled, displays can be controlled via HTTP API (for third‑party clients like Python).
api.tip2: By default, BroadcastChannel communication is used; no HTTP server is required.
api.tip3: Hint: If third‑party displays (especially Python clients) show anomalies or cannot connect, try toggling this switch and restart the app.

keys.title: Shortcut Keys
keys.editHint: Click the input box and press a keyboard key to modify the shortcut.

audio.title: Audio Settings
audio.enableVehicleHint: When disabled, arrival/departure announcements and recorded audio will be turned off.

multiScreen.title: Multi‑Screen Collaboration
multiScreen.entryDesc1: Send the address below to a remote browser/TV box to join multi‑screen collaboration.
multiScreen.entryDesc2: The page will automatically connect via WebSocket and synchronise stations, arrival/departure status, and control commands.
multiScreen.tips1: To ensure synchronisation, open the display page via http:// or https://.
multiScreen.tips2: If the port is occupied, the client will automatically switch to an available port.
multiScreen.qrDialogSubtitle: Scan with phone/browser to open the entry

releaseNotes.title: Release Notes
releaseNotes.emptySubtitle: Please try again later or check your network connection

update.isLatest: ✓ You are using the latest version
update.updateReadyHint: Update is ready. Click the button to restart the app and complete the update automatically – no installation steps required.
update.promptForce: This version is mandatory. Please update as soon as possible.
update.promptOptional: We recommend updating now to get the latest features and fixes.
update.promptBody: Please see the release notes below for update details.

console.title: PIDS Console
console.modeHint: Normal: stops at all stations; Express: stops at first/last and interchange stations only; Direct: stops only at first and last stations.
console.presetEmpty: No presets yet. Click “Save Preset” to save the current short‑turn settings.
console.electronOnlyError: Importing share codes is only supported in Electron environment
console.presetShareCodePrompt: Please enter the short‑turn preset share code:
console.shareCodeInvalid: Share code format is incorrect or corrupted
console.shareCodeJsonError: Share code content is not valid JSON
console.shareCodeTypeMismatch: Share code type mismatch or missing required fields
console.stationNotFound: The following stations were not found in the current line:
console.stationNotFoundDetail: Cannot import this preset. Please verify that the line data is correct.
console.presetImportNamePrompt: Enter a name for the imported preset (leave empty to use the name from the share)
console.throughNoSegments: No line segments yet. Click “Add” to add the first line.
console.autoplayLockConfirm: Enabling autoplay will lock the control panel. Please do not operate the controls while it is running. Continue?
console.autoplayStoppedMsg: Autoplay ended. The control panel has been unlocked.
console.recordingParallelHint: When enabled, recording is split into multiple segments that are recorded in parallel, then automatically concatenated.

lineManager.title: Line Manager
lineManager.stationManagerHint: Drag station bars to reorder. Right‑click a station to edit, delete, copy, cut, or paste. Right‑click empty area to create a new station.
lineManager.searchPlaceholder: Search lines, first station, last station...
lineManager.lineNameExists: A line with this name already exists. Please use another name.
lineManager.deleteOldFileWarning: Failed to delete old file, but new file was saved
lineManager.dialogDeleteLine: Are you sure you want to delete the line “{lineName}”?
lineManager.dialogInputPresetName: Enter a preset name (leave empty to use the suggested name)
lineManager.dialogDeletePreset: Are you sure you want to delete the preset “{presetName}”?
lineManager.throughSavingHint: Click the “Save Through Line” button at the bottom right to save it to the currently selected folder.
lineManager.searchResultHint: Try different keywords or search for folder names

lineManagerWindow.noAvailableFolders: No folders available. Please create a folder first to save the through line:
lineManagerWindow.selectFolderForThroughLine: Select a folder to save the through line:
lineManagerWindow.cannotSaveToDefaultOrCloudFolder: Cannot save to Default or Cloud folder. Please select another folder.
lineManagerWindow.cloudLineDataInvalid: Cloud line data is invalid and cannot be applied
lineManagerWindow.confirmDeleteFolder:
Are you sure you want to delete the folder “{folderName}”?

Warning: Deleting it will permanently remove the folder and all its contents. This action cannot be undone!
lineManagerWindow.cloudApplyOnlyNotice: Cloud lines only support applying, not creating or editing here.
lineManagerWindow.cloudApplyCopyOnlyNotice: Cloud lines only support applying and copying, not creating, cutting, pasting, or deleting here.

stationEditor.audioSelectHint: Ctrl for multi‑select, Shift for range select
stationEditor.xferEmpty: No interchanges yet. Right‑click to add or paste.
stationEditor.audioEmpty: No audio yet. Right‑click to add or paste.
stationEditor.audioCrashFallback: Audio area failed to load; fell back to simplified display. Please close and try again.
stationEditor.audioAddNeedElectron: Adding audio requires the Electron desktop environment
stationEditor.audioAddNeedSaveLine: Please save the line before adding audio
